mapper.select:
SELECT a.id AS account_id, a.display_name AS account_name, a.type AS account_type, a.currency AS account_currency, a.primary_owner_member_id AS owner_id, a.display_order AS display_order, p.id AS period_id, p.period_start AS period_start, p.period_end AS period_end, ( SELECT ps_prev.end_balance FROM period_snapshot ps_prev JOIN period p_prev ON p_prev.id = ps_prev.period_id WHERE ps_prev.account_id = a.id AND p_prev.period_start < p.period_start ORDER BY p_prev.period_start DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS previous_end_balance,
COALESCE( ps.end_balance, (SELECT ps_carry.end_balance FROM period_snapshot ps_carry JOIN period p_carry ON p_carry.id = ps_carry.period_id WHERE ps_carry.account_id = a.id AND p_carry.period_start <= p.period_start AND ps_carry.end_balance IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p_carry.period_start DESC LIMIT 1) ) AS end_balance, COALESCE(cf.income_orig, 0) AS income_orig, COALESCE(cf.expense_orig, 0) AS expense_orig, COALESCE(tin.transfer_in_orig, 0) AS transfer_in_orig, COALESCE(tout.transfer_out_orig, 0) AS transfer_out_orig,
CASE WHEN a.currency = #{f.viewCurrency} THEN 1.000000 WHEN ( #{f.viewCurrency} = #{baseCurrency} OR fx_bv.rate IS NOT NULL ) AND ( a.currency = #{baseCurrency} OR fx_ba.rate IS NOT NULL ) THEN ( CASE WHEN #{f.viewCurrency} = #{baseCurrency} THEN 1.000000 ELSE fx_bv.rate END ) / ( CASE WHEN a.currency = #{baseCurrency} THEN 1.000000 ELSE fx_ba.rate END ) ELSE 1.000000 END AS fx_to_base, pc.liquidity_class AS product_liquidity_class FROM account a LEFT JOIN product_category pc ON pc.code = a.product_category_code JOIN period p ON p.family_id = a.family_id AND p.period_type = #{f.periodType} LEFT JOIN period_snapshot ps ON ps.account_id = a.id AND ps.period_id = p.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT period_id, account_id, SUM(CASE WHEN kind = 'INCOME' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS income_orig, SUM(CASE WHEN kind = 'EXPENSE' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS expense_orig FROM cash_flow WHERE deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY period_id, account_id ) cf ON cf.period_id = p.id AND cf.account_id = a.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT period_id, to_account_id AS account_id, SUM(COALESCE(to_amount, amount)) AS transfer_in_orig FROM transfer WHERE is_draft = 0 AND deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY period_id, to_account_id ) tin ON tin.period_id = p.id AND tin.account_id = a.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT period_id, from_account_id AS account_id, SUM(amount) AS transfer_out_orig FROM transfer WHERE is_draft = 0 AND deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY period_id, from_account_id ) tout ON tout.period_id = p.id AND tout.account_id = a.id
LEFT JOIN fx_rate fx_bv ON fx_bv.family_id = a.family_id AND fx_bv.base_currency = #{baseCurrency} AND fx_bv.quote_currency = #{f.viewCurrency} AND fx_bv.period_id = ( SELECT fr.period_id FROM fx_rate fr JOIN period pp ON pp.id = fr.period_id WHERE fr.family_id = a.family_id AND fr.base_currency = #{baseCurrency} AND fr.quote_currency = #{f.viewCurrency} AND pp.period_start <= #{f.rangeEnd} ORDER BY pp.period_start DESC LIMIT 1) LEFT JOIN fx_rate fx_ba ON fx_ba.family_id = a.family_id AND fx_ba.base_currency = #{baseCurrency} AND fx_ba.quote_currency = a.currency AND fx_ba.period_id = ( SELECT fr.period_id FROM fx_rate fr JOIN period pp ON pp.id = fr.period_id WHERE fr.family_id = a.family_id AND fr.base_currency = #{baseCurrency} AND fr.quote_currency = a.currency AND pp.period_start <= #{f.rangeEnd} ORDER BY pp.period_start DESC LIMIT 1) WHERE a.family_id = #{f.familyId} AND p.period_start BETWEEN #{f.rangeStart} AND #{f.rangeEnd}
AND a.archived_at IS NULL
AND a.id IN
#{id}
ORDER BY p.period_start, a.display_order, a.id
